text:
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_11_12 

LABEL: Managed Care Plan Type Code (11th Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the 11th of up to 16 managed care plan type codes: A model of health care delivery 
organized to provide a defined set of services in the month. There are separate variables for each of 
the 12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_11_01 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_11_02 
MC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_11_03
